user.title: Sign in to Divoom
user.description: One-time sign-in to enumerate devices and fetch each LocalToken. Only UserId, cloud Token, and per-device LocalToken are stored — not your password. After that, all commands stay on your LAN.

pick_device.title: Pick a device
pick_device.description: Each device becomes its own entry. Add the flow again for the second one.

reauth_confirm.title: Sign in again
reauth_confirm.description: The stored token was rejected. Re-enter your Divoom credentials to refresh the LocalToken.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Divoom cloud.
error.no_devices_found: No Divoom devices found on this account.
error.unknown_device: That device is no longer on the account.

send_text.name: Send text
send_text.description: Display a scrolling text on a Times Gate.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: Divoom DeviceId or HA config entry id.

text_id.name: Text ID
text_id.description: Slot 1..19; reusing the same ID overwrites.
